body: Quick reply — will follow up properly tomorrow.\n\n— Paul
subject: Re: Museum shift next week

body:
Tom - 7:10 works for me Saturday. I will drive, pick you up at 6:40. Tell Walt to leave the swing commentary in the car.

- Paul
subject: Re: Saturday tee time moved up

body:
Brett - the flights are booked, we land Friday at 4:15. No need to pick us up, we are renting. Tell Owen I am bringing the F-86 book he asked about.

- Dad
subject: Re: Denver visit - getting things sorted

body:
Kelsey - 4:00 Sunday is good as always. Your mother wants to show you the Sedona photos. Tell Daniel I finally moved the practice trade he set up.

- Dad
subject: Re: Sunday FaceTime

body:
Carol - I can cover the Thursday school group if you still need a docent. I will be on the simulator exhibit either way. Let me know by Wednesday.

- Paul
subject: Docent coverage Thursday

body:
Ed - dinner the 19th works. The usual place at 6? I will not bring up the 777 if you do not.

- Paul
subject: Monthly dinner

body:
Walt - count me in for Saturday. I will walk as usual, you can take the cart if your knee is acting up again.

- Paul
subject: Re: Saturday group

body:
Judith - I put the Kaplan follow-up on the calendar for the 24th at 10:30. You are driving, per the usual arrangement. Bring the medication list.

- Paul
subject: Cardiology follow-up

body:
Jim - good talking last night. Let us aim for the first week of March, I can drive down to Tucson Tuesday after my museum shift. Tell me what works.

- Paul
subject: Visit to Tucson

body:
Tom - the new Titleist wedges came in at Pinnacle. Worth a look before Saturday. I am stopping by the pro shop Thursday afternoon if you want to come.

- Paul
subject: Pro shop run

body:
Margaret - the docent handbook draft looks good. I marked two corrections on the simulator section, page 14. Otherwise ready to go.

- Paul
subject: Handbook draft notes

body:
Daniel - I moved the practice position like you showed me, no real money on it. Walk me through the staking thing Sunday if you have a few minutes.

- Paul
subject: Re: crypto practice

body:
Judith - Sedona for the long weekend? Red Rock Lodge had a room when I checked. I can book it tonight if you are in.

- Paul
subject: Sedona weekend

body:
Raymond - I would like to go over the quarterly numbers before the next review. A phone call this week works better than email. Wednesday afternoon?

- Paul
subject: Quarterly review prep

body:
Rebecca - I can take the morning school group on the 12th. Two classes is fine, I will keep them moving and get them into the simulator in shifts.

- Paul
subject: School group the 12th

body:
Brett - tell Owen the chess set arrived here too, we can play over FaceTime if he wants. I am rusty but he beats me anyway.

- Dad
subject: Chess with Owen

body:
Sue - thank Tom for the lift Friday, my truck was in for service. Judith says hello and the lemon chicken recipe is coming your way.

- Paul
subject: Thanks for Friday

body:
Dr. Santos office - confirming the annual physical on the 20th at 9:00. I will fast that morning per the bloodwork instructions.

- Paul Rivera
subject: Annual physical confirmation

body:
Lisa - the shoulder is better with the stretches. I can keep the Tuesday slot but may need to move it the week of the 17th, museum schedule. Will confirm.

- Paul
subject: PT scheduling

body:
Walt - good round today even with the wind. Same time next Saturday. Tell Greg he owes me a coffee from the back nine.

- Paul
subject: Good round
